title: echium russicum var. acutifolium
intro: Echium russicum var. acutifolium, also known as Russian comfrey or prickly comfrey, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Echium russicum var. acutifolium include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to promote healing and reduce pain.
